title: FIREWOOD MINISTRY WOOD BANK - 211info
text: NATIVITY IN BEND FIREWOOD MINISTRY WOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides firewood to households; can receive wood once per month. Donations of fallen trees are accepted. 60850 Brosterhous Road Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Low income households Hours: Wood pickup: October-March, Saturday by appointment Email (541) 338-0765 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (541) 338-0765 Intake (541) 678-4867 Wood Bank Tanya Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the intake line and leave a message. Appointments are required. FEES: $30 suggested donation for 1/3 cord of wood, but no one will be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of Brosterhous Road and Knott Road Services: Donation Drop Off Points Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - NATIVITY FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIVITY IN BEND
